name: Necromancer-I'm the Scourge！
detailed_description:
The game world has come to reality, all the rules have been subverted, and mankind has entered the era of national job transfer! Players will take on the role of a high school student who becomes a rare necromancer during the class transfer ceremony, embarks on one adventure after another, and gains self-growth and precious friendships. Through adventure and combat, the game makes people appreciate the preciousness and beauty of courage, camaraderie, and perseverance.

The main in-game features include:

Start Game - Click to enter to start game

Archive Read archive - You can click the archive button in the game to save the current chapter (you can choose multiple nodes to save), select any archive interface to enter the corresponding node

Chapter collation - You can select any chapter to enter the corresponding game chapter content

Path to God - Displays background images of all chapters the player has passed

Settings - Adjust the screen of the game's resolution, volume, language adjustment, etc

supported_languages:
English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*, Korean, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
